get.description:
Returns top attack paths computed by the APME for a given scan.
Paths are ordered by score descending (highest risk first).
Each step is tagged as 'validated' or 'inferred'.

username.title: Username
username.description: Required. 150 characters or fewer. Letters, digits and @/./+/-/_ only.

task.title: Task Name
task.description: The Name of the Celery Task that Should be Run.  (Example: "proj.tasks.import_contacts")

queue.title: Queue Override
queue.description: Queue defined in CELERY_TASK_QUEUES. Leave None for default queuing.

exchange.title: Exchange
exchange.description: Override Exchange for low-level AMQP routing

routing_key.title: Routing Key
routing_key.description: Override Routing Key for low-level AMQP routing

headers.title: AMQP Message Headers
headers.description: JSON encoded message headers for the AMQP message.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: Priority Number between 0 and 255. Supported by: RabbitMQ, Redis (priority reversed, 0 is highest).

expires.title: Expires Datetime
expires.description: Datetime after which the schedule will no longer trigger the task to run

expire_seconds.title: Expires timedelta with seconds
expire_seconds.description: Timedelta with seconds which the schedule will no longer trigger the task to run

one_off.title: One-off Task
one_off.description: If True, the schedule will only run the task a single time

start_time.title: Start Datetime
start_time.description: Datetime when the schedule should begin triggering the task to run

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Set to False to disable the schedule

last_run_at.title: Last Run Datetime
last_run_at.description: Datetime that the schedule last triggered the task to run. Reset to None if enabled is set to False.

total_run_count.title: Total Run Count
total_run_count.description: Running count of how many times the schedule has triggered the task

date_changed.title: Last Modified
date_changed.description: Datetime that this PeriodicTask was last modified

description.title: Description
description.description: Detailed description about the details of this Periodic Task

every.title: Number of Periods
every.description: Number of interval periods to wait before running the task again

period.title: Interval Period
period.description: The type of period between task runs (Example: days)

minute.title: Minute(s)
minute.description: Cron Minutes to Run. Use "*" for "all". (Example: "0,30")

hour.title: Hour(s)
hour.description: Cron Hours to Run. Use "*" for "all". (Example: "8,20")

day_of_month.title: Day(s) Of The Month
day_of_month.description: Cron Days Of The Month to Run. Use "*" for "all". (Example: "1,15")

month_of_year.title: Month(s) Of The Year
month_of_year.description: Cron Months (1-12) Of The Year to Run. Use "*" for "all". (Example: "1,12")

day_of_week.title: Day(s) Of The Week
day_of_week.description: Cron Days Of The Week to Run. Use "*" for "all", Sunday is 0 or 7, Monday is 1. (Example: "0,5")

timezone.title: Cron Timezone
timezone.description: Timezone to Run the Cron Schedule on. Default is UTC.

event.title: Solar Event
event.description: The type of solar event when the job should run

latitude.title: Latitude
latitude.description: Run the task when the event happens at this latitude

longitude.title: Longitude
longitude.description: Run the task when the event happens at this longitude

clocked_time.title: Clock Time
clocked_time.description: Run the task at clocked time

solar.title: Solar Schedule

clocked.title: Clocked Schedule
clocked.description: Clocked Schedule to run the task on.  Set only one schedule type, leave the others null.

anchor_step.title: Anchor step
anchor_step.description: Core engine task name this plugin attaches to

order_weight.title: Order weight
order_weight.description: Used for relative sorting within the same anchor/position

is_active.title: Active
is_active.description: Designates whether this user should be treated as active. Unselect this instead of deleting accounts.

is_staff.title: Staff status
